title: Which term refers to the process of creating and deploying applications that are secure from the start?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
Which term refers to the process of creating and deploying applications that are secure from the start?


Risk Management


Waterfall


DevOps


Compliance Assessment

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
Which principle is in effect when an analyst has a lower level of access than a Client Account Lead (CAL) working on the same project?


The Privileges and Immunities Principle


The Principle of Known Threat Management


The Principle of Least Privilege


The Principle of Superposition

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
What is "defense in depth"?


security defense that is confidential, integrous, and available


when security is an ongoing process rather than a one-and-done


when security is part of the design process and built in from the start


security designed with multiple levels of fail-safe practices

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: Security designed with multiple levels of fail-safe practices.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
An intruder with malicious intent breaks into an office and steals a hard drive containing sensitive information about the company’s business. However, when attempting to access the drive’s contents, the intruder is met with the company’s authentication protocols and data encryption measures.

What type of security is illustrated in this example?


Data Security


Governance


Product Security


Cyber Intelligence

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
Company A acquired Company B and they realize that their standard security policy documents do not match. They escalate this issue to the company’s central Security team, who implements a plan to formalize security strategy, high-level responsibilities, policies and procedures around security of both companies.

Which security principle is illustrated in this example?


Compliance


Governance


Availability


Risk Management

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
Accenture is helping a major retailer migrate to the Cloud. The client has aggressive timelines and is worried that security will be compromised.

How can Accenture help the client?


Accenture should develop a custom solution and suggest a timeline extension.


Accenture has developed accelerators that can deploy specific security controls in hours, a task that used to take months.


Accenture should advise the client to wait until the next phase to implement security controls.


Accenture recommends that the additional security controls are not needed since the Cloud is secure by default.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: Accenture has developed accelerators that can deploy specific security controls in hours, a task that used to take months.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
When companies study the possibility of moving to the Cloud, they often perceive that security is a roadblock to making things happen quickly.

What should Accenture tell a client about their capabilities?


Accenture integrates security early in the process and implements their own patented innovations to automate processes and migrate in a much shorter period of time.


After monitoring the security solution, Accenture can provide a few additional personnel to develop workarounds.


Accenture’s security solution is so robust that it can be deployed on top of an existing system on the Cloud with no impact.


Once an incident occurs, Accenture establishes controls to block accidental or malicious activities.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: Accenture integrates security early in the process and implements their own patented innovations to automate processes and migrate in a much shorter period of time.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
Which term refers to a process that is deployed to ensure the confidentiality and integrity of data while being stored or when it is transmitted?


Security Operations


Encryption


Access Management


Cloud Computing
